mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, user_id AS userId, create_time AS createTime FROM inspiration WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT i.id, i.user_id AS userId, i.title, i.content, i.create_time AS createTime, u.username FROM inspiration i LEFT JOIN user u ON i.user_id = u.id WHERE i.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY i.create_time DESC
